turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, hello. Mujhe, uh, apna bill clear karna tha. Last month mera operation hua tha aur abhi bhi outstanding hai kuch.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan bilkul, main aapki madad karunga. Aapka naam aur patient ID bata sakte hain?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Meera Joshi. Patient ID shayad... P-zero-zero-four-five-six hai.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you, Ms. Joshi. I can see an outstanding balance of ₹12,400 against your procedure on the 14th of last month. Would you like to pay this now over the phone or prefer to visit the billing desk?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Can I pay by UPI? I have GPay.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely. I'll send a payment link to your registered mobile number ending in 67. Once you complete the payment, you'll receive a receipt via SMS and email.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Done, I got the link. Paying now... okay it went through.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Wonderful! Your payment of ₹12,400 has been received. Your account is now fully cleared. Thank you, Ms. Joshi!
